title: Maytenus bukobina
taxonomy: Maytenus bukobina belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant in the genus Maytenus. Maytenus bukobina is native to Tanzania. The classification of Maytenus bukobina also includes its order and class, which are Celastrales and Magnoliopsida respectively. Maytenus bukobina is a woody evergreen plant.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system and exert antimicrobial effects.
